summary: Keyboard sits directly in front of a monitor on a long desk; nearby are papers under/behind it, loose cables, and a small orange item. The workstation is an L-shaped/long desk along the walls with multiple chairs, another monitor at the far left, and many papers spread across the corner section.

payload.answer:
Major objects around the keyboard: the keyboard is directly in front of the monitor on the desk, with papers under/behind the monitor stand near the keyboard, loose cables/wires on the desk, and a small orange item (likely a tag/lanyard) next to the cable near the keyboard area (frame 1).

Overall workstation layout: a long desk runs along the wall (forming a corner/L-shape area) with the main monitor+keyboard centered at one spot, multiple office chairs in front of the desk, and another monitor at the far left section. Papers are spread across the corner/adjacent desk surfaces. In the wider view, a desktop tower sits under the desk (frames 0, 2).
supporting_claims: The keyboard is placed on the desk directly in front of the monitor (frame 1).
Papers and loose cables are on the desk near the keyboard/monitor area (frame 1).
The workstation is a long/corner desk setup with multiple chairs and another monitor on the left; papers are spread across the corner section (frame 2).
A desktop computer tower is under the desk in the wider workstation view (frame 0).

uncertainties: A mouse is not clearly visible near the keyboard in the provided views.
Some small desk items are indistinct (e.g., small white object to the right of the keyboard).

evidence_items.claim: A monitor sits on the desk with a keyboard placed directly in front of it.
Papers are on the desk under/behind the monitor stand and near the keyboard.
Cables/wires lie on the desk surface near the keyboard area.
The workstation uses a long desk along the wall with multiple chairs; a desktop tower is under the desk in the wider view.
There is another monitor at the far left section of the desk and a large spread of papers across the corner section.

tool_input.request_text: Need closer/alternate views of the desk surface around the keyboard to identify nearby objects (mouse, phone, notebooks, etc.) and better capture the overall workstation layout. Please provide neighboring keyframes from left/right and a closer shot of the right side of the desk where the keyboard appears.
